llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes were announced. President Lawson asked "Do we have any changes to the agenda?" and there was no response indicating changes. The agenda was approved as posted.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: We are on consent calendar. Make a motion to approve. So moved. Seconded. All those in favor? Aye.
